calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evan Abrams appeared by zoom for St. Mary's Medical Center Foundation (Trustee).

The Court noted that in 1998 Mr. Abrams' Client came in and asked the Court to modify the trust to be consistent with the Trustor's intent to distribute the income and that what the prayer of that petition asked for was consistent with the order (the greater of all interest and dividends, or 6% be distributed). The Court also informed Mr. Abrams that it is not in the business of vacating a 23-year-old order, that the judgment is going to stand, questions whether this is an issue of all of the principal now being eaten into and asked if all of the funds are going to St. Mary's to care for indigent patients, how is this wasteful or impractical. Mr. Abrams stated that it seems to be more than is needed, and that for budgeting purposes and for keeping donors interested in donating, it's not useful for the department to have a buildup. The Court stated that it is having a hard time seeing this as being wasteful and impractical, that St. Mary's can provide it to other hospitals to provide care for indigent patients, noted that the Attorney General is not objecting and stated that it is troubled by the representations that were made in 1998. The Petitions for Instructions is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.
